response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (the video is promotional and contains dialogue rather than vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used to understand the overall structure of the video. The spoken dialogue and visual text were transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle timecodes are meticulously synchronized with the speakers' vocalizations. Prominent silent on-screen cards at the beginning of the concert stream are included to ensure completeness under the Visual Events rule.
